module.name: stamp
module.description: A decorated label — a "stamp" such as CONFIDENTIAL, DRAFT or INTERNAL. The label is the block BODY (so spaces, commas and symbols are fine). Designed to drop inside a slide's @header / @footer block, but works in body text too. The default "double" style reproduces the classic double-bordered header badge.

snippet.label: Stamp (CONFIDENTIAL)
snippet.description: A double-bordered badge. variant: double | solid | outline | plain.

snippet.label: Header with stamp
snippet.description: A slide header containing a CONFIDENTIAL stamp. In the meta page it applies to all slides; in a slide it applies to that slide only.
